content: BP demonstrates solid credibility on water and wastewater management, with quantified disclosure identifying water-stressed operating sites and a clean regulatory record showing no violations across seven Environment Agency pollution records. Talent signals suggest some workforce capability in this area, though the small sample size (n=7) and absence of senior-level expertise warrants cautious interpretation. The words_money stream was excluded due to no monetary commitments being extracted from the available text, meaning financial backing for water initiatives cannot be assessed from this evidence.
